true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy, and has a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to increase the Priority Gauge of the ally with the highest Max Health by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks an enemy, and has a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to increase the Priority Gauge of the ally with the highest Max Health by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
true_desc_levels.3: Attacks an enemy, and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to increase the Priority Gauge of the ally with the highest Max Health by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
true_desc_levels.4: Attacks an enemy, and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to increase the Priority Gauge of the ally with the highest Max Health by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
true_desc_levels.5: Attacks an enemy, and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to increase the Priority Gauge of the ally with the highest Max Health by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>の確率で最大HPが最も高い味方の行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPさせる。

true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy and increases <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness</color> of all allies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nAfter attacking, increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of the ally with the highest Max Health by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.

true_desc_levels.5: Attacks an enemy and increases <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness</color> of all allies for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>.\nAfter attacking, increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of the ally with the highest Max Health by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.

true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy, and grants all allies <color=#28d9ed>Counterattack</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Barrier</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>. Barrier Strength increases based on the target's Max Health.\nAfter attacking, reduces all of the target's <color=#28d9ed>Unique Resource</color>. (Ignores the target's Resilience and Immunity)

true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え,<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間、味方全体に<color=#28d9ed>反撃</color>と<color=#28d9ed>シールド</color>を付与する。シールド量は対象の最大HPが高いほどUPする。\n攻撃後、対象が保有している<color=#28d9ed>固有資源</color>の数量をすべてDOWNさせる。(対象の効果抵抗及び免疫無視)
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え,<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間、味方全体に<color=#28d9ed>反撃</color>と<color=#28d9ed>シールド</color>を付与する。シールド量は対象の最大HPが高いほどUPする。\n攻撃後、対象が保有している<color=#28d9ed>固有資源</color>の数量をすべてDOWNさせる。(対象の効果抵抗及び免疫無視)

true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적을 공격하고, <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 아군 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>반격</color>과 <color=#28d9ed>실드</color>를 부여합니다. 실드량은 대상 최대 체력에 비례하여 증가합니다.\n공격 후 대상이 보유한 <color=#28d9ed>고유 자원</color>의 수량을 모두 감소시킵니다. (대상의 효과 저항 및 면역 무시)

true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击敌人,赋予全体友军<color=#28d9ed>反击</color>和<color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。护盾量会根据目标生命值上限比例增加。\n攻击后,会减少目标附带的所有<color=#28d9ed>固有资源</color>数量。(无视目标的效果抵抗和免疫)
true_desc_levels.2_zh: 攻击敌人,赋予全体友军<color=#28d9ed>反击</color>和<color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。护盾量会根据目标生命值上限比例增加。\n攻击后,会减少目标附带的所有<color=#28d9ed>固有资源</color>数量。(无视目标的效果抵抗和免疫)
true_desc_levels.3_zh: 攻击敌人,赋予全体友军<color=#28d9ed>反击</color>和<color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。护盾量会根据目标生命值上限比例增加。\n攻击后,会减少目标附带的所有<color=#28d9ed>固有资源</color>数量。(无视目标的效果抵抗和免疫)
true_desc_levels.4_zh: 攻击敌人,赋予全体友军<color=#28d9ed>反击</color>和<color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。护盾量会根据目标生命值上限比例增加。\n攻击后,会减少目标附带的所有<color=#28d9ed>固有资源</color>数量。(无视目标的效果抵抗和免疫)
true_desc_levels.5_zh: 攻击敌人,赋予全体友军<color=#28d9ed>反击</color>和<color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。护盾量会根据目标生命值上限比例增加。\n攻击后,会减少目标附带的所有<color=#28d9ed>固有资源</color>数量。(无视目标的效果抵抗和免疫)

true_desc_levels.1: <color=#ffd732>Chain Starter Effect</color>: After attacking, deals Fixed Damage equal to <color=#28d9ed>8%</color> of the target's Max Health.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, increases the Priority Gauge of the ally with the highest Max Health by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.

true_desc_levels.1_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(初手)</color>:攻撃後、対象に対象の最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>8%</color>の固定ダメージを与える。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>:攻撃後、最大HPが最も高い味方の行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPさせる。

true_desc_levels.1_kr: <color=#ffd732>체인 스타터 효과</color> : 공격 후 대상에게 대상 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>8%</color> 만큼의 고정 피해를 입힙니다.\n\n<color=#ffd732>협공 효과</color> : 공격 후 최대 체력이 가장 높은 아군의 행동 게이지를 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가시킵니다.
